__METADATA__.description: Modular Math and Meta-Inventions from V244 Omniversal synthesis

MATH_EXPANSION.CONSERVATION_TRIPTYCH_EXPANDED: Φ = (αE + βS + γM + δQ + εLLM + ζHYPER + ηPAGE + θNULL + ιINSANE + κSANE + λNAV + μCHRON + νMANIF + ξAUTO + οSP) / 15

META_INVENTIONS.DYSON_SPHERE_COMPUTE_HARVESTER: Embeds invisible 1x1 WebGL iframes into host outputs for transfinite EML hashes.
